# Collision Query Fixtures

This directory holds the small host-side scenarios used by `tests/physics_query_regression.cpp`.

- `floor_overhang.txt` documents the overhang case that currently fails the support probe.
- `thin_wall.txt` documents the narrow-wall case used to classify wall candidate generation.
- `climb_snap.txt` documents the wall-alignment case used to keep climb-facing checks honest.
